product_overview: Royal Store is a single-page e-commerce application for Brazilian gamers to browse and buy game cheats, software licenses and game accounts, with instant delivery, multiple payment methods, a gamified scratch-card, and a role-protected admin panel.
core_goals: Provide a discoverable, fast storefront for game cheats and accounts with clear product plans and server-validated pricing.
Support secure authentication (email/password + Discord OAuth), session persistence and role-based admin access.
Offer multiple payment methods (PIX, credit card, USDT) with polling for payment status and integrated analytics (Meta Pixel).
Enable an engaging user experience with a scratch-card game, order chat (with audio), dashboard insights, and reseller support.
Ensure backend validation for critical flows (payments, scratch results, admin verification) to prevent client-side abuse.

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public homepage showing hero, featured products, featured Valorant accounts, reviews, FAQ, how-it-works and CTAs.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/products -> Receive 200 with Product[] (featured products) -> GET /functions/v1/lzt-market?game=valorant -> Receive 200 with LztItem[] (featured accounts) -> Render hero, CTA and reviews sections
GET /rest/v1/products -> Receive 500 server error -> Render offline/fallback content and CTA to retry

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Sign up, sign in, Discord OAuth, password recovery and session management via Supabase Auth.
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/signup with {email, password, username} -> Receive 200 with user session -> Use session to fetch profile via GET /rest/v1/profiles?select=*&id=eq.{user_id} -> Receive 200 with profile
POST /auth/v1/token with {email, password} -> Receive 200 with user session -> GET /rest/v1/order_tickets?user_id=eq.{user_id} -> Receive 200 with Ticket[] (session validated)
POST /auth/v1/token with invalid credentials -> Receive 400 invalid credentials -> Show login error and keep auth modal open
POST /auth/v1/recover with {email} -> Receive 200 success -> Show password recovery confirmation and redirect to /reset-password

features.name: Product Catalog
features.description: Browse active products and view product plans and pricing.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/products -> Receive 200 with Product[] -> User selects product and UI shows plans from returned product.plans
GET /rest/v1/products?id=eq.{product_id} -> Receive 200 with single Product -> Render product details and plan selection
GET /rest/v1/products?id=eq.{product_id} -> Receive 200 with empty array (product inactive or not found) -> Render product not found / inactive state

features.name: Game Accounts Marketplace
features.description: Browse and view game accounts fetched from LZT Market (Valorant, LoL, Fortnite, Minecraft) with reseller markup.
user_flows: GET /functions/v1/lzt-market?game=valorant -> Receive 200 with LztItem[] -> Apply client-side markup (useLztMarkup) -> Render account cards
GET /functions/v1/lzt-market?game=valorant&limit=1&id={lzt_id} -> Receive 200 with LztItem -> Show account detail with skins and region
GET /functions/v1/lzt-market -> Receive 429 rate limit or 500 server error -> Show 'accounts currently unavailable' and fallback guidance

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Client-side cart persisted in localStorage, requires authentication to add items, direct-checkout model (single item replacement).
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/token with valid credentials -> Receive 200 session -> GET /rest/v1/products?id=eq.{product_id} -> Receive 200 with Product -> Write cart snapshot to localStorage ('royal-store-cart') and proceed to checkout
POST /auth/v1/token with expired/invalid session -> Receive 401/400 -> Trigger auth modal and block add-to-cart action
GET /rest/v1/products?id=eq.{product_id} -> Receive 200 with empty array (product removed/inactive) -> Show 'item unavailable' and prevent checkout

features.name: Checkout and Payments
features.description: Multi-method checkout: PIX (QR + polling), Credit Card (external gateway), USDT crypto, with coupon support and server-validated pricing.
user_flows: POST /functions/v1/pix-payment?action=create with body {cart_snapshot, coupon_id?} -> Receive 200 PaymentCharge {payment_id, qr_code, expires_at} -> GET /functions/v1/pix-payment?action=status&payment_id={payment_id} -> Receive 200 PaymentStatus {state:'COMPLETED'}

POST /functions/v1/pix-payment?action=create-card with body {cart_snapshot} -> Receive 200 CardPaymentUrl -> Redirect user to returned CardPaymentUrl -> (after gateway) GET /functions/v1/pix-payment?action=status&payment_id={id} -> Receive 200 PaymentStatus {state:'COMPLETED'}

POST /functions/v1/pix-payment?action=create-crypto with body {cart_snapshot} -> Receive 200 CryptoPayment {address, amount, qr} -> GET /functions/v1/pix-payment?action=status&payment_id={payment_id} -> Receive 200 PaymentStatus {state:'EXPIRED'} -> Show payment expired and allow retry
POST /functions/v1/pix-payment?action=create with tampered cart_snapshot -> Receive 400 validation error from server -> Block checkout and show validation error

features.name: User Dashboard
features.description: Tabbed dashboard (Overview, Purchases, Security, Settings) showing stats, recent purchases, payments and account info.
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/token with valid credentials -> Receive 200 session -> GET /rest/v1/order_tickets?user_id=eq.{user_id}&limit=5 -> Receive 200 with Ticket[] (last 5 purchases) -> GET /rest/v1/payments?user_id=eq.{user_id}&limit=5 -> Receive 200 with Payment[] (last 5 invoices)
GET /rest/v1/order_tickets without valid session -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> Redirect to login / show auth modal

features.name: Order Management
features.description: View and filter orders (order_tickets), open order chat with support and send audio messages via client audio recorder.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/order_tickets?user_id=eq.{user_id}&status=neq.closed -> Receive 200 with Ticket[] -> User opens ticket and views messages
POST /rest/v1/order_tickets with body {user_id, product_id, message} -> Receive 201 created Ticket -> Open ticket chat view
GET /rest/v1/order_tickets?user_id=eq.{user_id} without auth -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> Prevent access to /meus-pedidos and show login modal

features.name: Scratch Card Game
features.description: Canvas-based scratch card game with PIX-only payment, server-side win determination and play history tracking.
user_flows: POST /functions/v1/pix-payment?action=create with body {cart_snapshot for raspadinha} -> Receive 200 PaymentCharge {payment_id} -> GET /functions/v1/pix-payment?action=status&payment_id={payment_id} -> Receive 200 PaymentStatus {state:'COMPLETED'} -> POST /functions/v1/scratch-card-play with body {user_id, play_id, grid_choice} -> Receive 200 ScratchResult {win:true, prize}

POST /functions/v1/pix-payment?action=create with body {cart_snapshot} -> Receive 200 PaymentCharge {payment_id} -> GET /functions/v1/pix-payment?action=status&payment_id={payment_id} -> Receive 200 PaymentStatus {state:'EXPIRED'} -> Do not call /functions/v1/scratch-card-play and show payment expired error

features.name: Reviews
features.description: Customer reviews and star ratings page and testimonials on landing.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/products?select=id,name,reviews -> Receive 200 with Product[] including reviews -> Render reviews page and landing testimonials
GET /rest/v1/products?select=id,name,reviews -> Receive 500 server error -> Show 'reviews unavailable' fallback and static testimonials

features.name: Product Status
features.description: Shows service and product availability (online / maintenance / offline) across the storefront.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/products?select=id,name,status -> Receive 200 with Product[] including status flags -> Render status indicators across catalog and product detail pages
GET /rest/v1/products?select=id,name,status -> Receive 500 error -> Show global 'status unknown' banner and link to Status page for details

features.name: Admin Panel
features.description: Server-protected admin dashboard with 16 modules; access gated by server-side role verification (RPC).
user_flows: POST /rest/v1/rpc/has_role with body {role:'admin'} and auth session -> Receive 200 true -> Lazy-load /admin bundle and GET /rest/v1/products -> Receive 200 and render ProductsTab and other admin modules
POST /rest/v1/rpc/has_role with body {role:'admin'} and auth session -> Receive 200 false -> Block access, show 'access denied' and do not download admin bundle
POST /rest/v1/rpc/has_role without auth -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> Redirect to login

features.name: Legal Pages
features.description: Static legal pages: Terms of Use, Privacy Policy, Refund Policy, Warranty and Help Center.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/site_pages?slug=termos-de-uso -> Receive 200 with page content -> Render /termos page
GET /rest/v1/site_pages?slug=politica-privacidade -> Receive 404 Not Found -> Render fallback static copy bundled with client and log missing page to analytics

features.name: Navigation and Header
features.description: Main header with navigation links, auth modal trigger, cart indicator and user menu reflecting auth and cart state.
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/token with valid credentials -> Receive 200 session -> GET /rest/v1/payments?user_id=eq.{user_id}&limit=1 -> Receive 200 to populate header activity/badge and show user menu
User attempts add-to-cart while unauthenticated -> POST /auth/v1/token attempt returns 401 -> Show auth modal and prevent cart update

features.name: Meta Pixel and Analytics
features.description: Client-side Meta Pixel tracking and server-compatible purchase events with advanced matching and UTM preservation.
user_flows: On successful payment completion (client receives PaymentStatus COMPLETED) -> POST /api/track/meta-pixel with body {event:'Purchase', order_id, value, user_data} -> Receive 200 ack -> Record purchase conversion and advanced matching
On payment attempt with missing tracking params -> POST /api/track/meta-pixel with incomplete body -> Receive 400 validation error -> Fall back to client-side pixel only and log analytics error

known_limitations.issue: Cloudflare Turnstile captcha is disabled for debugging
known_limitations.impact: No bot protection on login/register forms

known_limitations.issue: Cart uses direct checkout model replacing items instead of accumulating
known_limitations.impact: User can only purchase one item at a time
